title: alnus × fallacina
intro: Alnus × fallacina, also known as green alder or fallacina, is a hybrid plant species derived from the alder tree family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds. The health benefits of Alnus × fallacina include potential treatments for fever reduction, skin conditions, and as an antiseptic. Herbal preparations of Alnus × fallacina can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures for its medicinal use.
